prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction without additional market data, I assume random walk behavior with historical volatility. AON typically has annualized volatility around 20-25%. For 2 days, this translates to roughly 1.2% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes no drift, with confidence intervals based on normal distribution of returns scaled by sqrt(2) for the 2-day period.
